mapper.select: SELECT FROM `workflow_node` WHERE `workflow_definition_id` = #{workflowDefinitionId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY `workflow_node_id`
mapper.update: UPDATE `workflow_node` SET `workflow_definition_id` = #{workflowDefinitionId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `node_id` = #{nodeId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `node_name` = #{nodeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `node_type` = #{nodeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `state_code` = #{stateCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `lane_name` = #{laneName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `responsible_actor_code` = #{responsibleActorCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `responsible_actor_name` = #{responsibleActorName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `candidate_role_code` = #{candidateRoleCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `operation_mode` = #{operationMode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `represented_actor_code` = #{representedActorCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `represented_actor_name` = #{representedActorName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE `workflow_node_id` = #{workflowNodeId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
